heading: Quick Start
description: Get up and running with Cmssy in minutes.

steps.title: Create a workspace
steps.content: Sign up at cmssy.io/signup and create your first workspace. Choose a name and slug for your project.

steps.title: Install blocks from the library
steps.content: Go to the Design Library and browse available block packages. Click Install to add them to your workspace.

steps.title: Build your first page
steps.content: Open the Page Builder, drag blocks from the palette onto the canvas, and edit their content in the properties panel.

steps.title: Publish and go live
steps.content: Click Publish to make your page live. Optionally connect a custom domain in workspace settings.
